unhostedWallets.notes: The 2020 FinCEN proposed rulemaking on unhosted wallets (requiring identity verification above $3,000) was never finalized and remains a proposal only. No enacted requirement exists for unhosted wallet verification.

rules.notes: BSA Travel Rule under 31 CFR 1010.410, in effect since 1996 for all funds transfers at or above $3,000. FinCEN's application to CVC/LTDA was clarified via a final rule published in 2020 (effective 2021). For non-established customers only, an identification number (SSN/EIN or passport) is also required under paragraph (e)(2). Beneficiary address is a pass-through obligation (transmit if received), not a mandatory collection requirement. A 2024 amendment (89 FR 72274) would explicitly codify CVC/LTDA in the regulation text, but its effective date has been delayed to 2028-01-01 (per 91 FR 36, January 2, 2026) and does not change the practical requirements.
